reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine what type of movie Blank Check and Air Bud are each described as.
original_final_question: Blank Check and Air Bud are both examples of what type of movie? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Blank Check is described as an American comedy film, and Air Bud is also described as an American comedy film, so both are examples of American comedy movies. -> American comedy
